title: dryoathyrium erectum
intro: Dryoathyrium erectum, also known as the upright dryad's sword, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Dryoathyrium and family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryoathyrium erectum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
